name: Peanut Pie
recipeInstructions:
From "A Taste of the South" by Terry Thompson (HP Books; 1988).
Beat eggs, corn syrup, sugar, peanut butter and vanilla until smooth and thickened, about 4 minutes. Stir in peanuts and blend. Roll out pastry to fit a 9-inch pie pan. Pour filling into pan. Bake at 400°F for 15 minutes. Reduce heat to 350°F and bake until knife inserted in center comes out clean, 30-35 minutes. Cool completely before serving. Top each slice with whipped cream. Makes 8 servings.
Each serving contains about: 583 calories; 118 milligrams sodium; 122 milligrams cholesterol; 34 grams fat; 62 grams carbohydrates; 13 grams protein; 1.38 grams fiber.
